summary: Phase 2 Deferred Slice 2 (lightweight local todo reminder store) is complete and verified. All checks pass: deterministic createReminderStore with full test coverage (adding, pending listing, due detection sorted by time, completion, serialization, invalid input validation), minimal integration in src/App.tsx (polling interval plus toggleable inline input), acceptance report written, build succeeds (93/93 tests pass), and no forbidden Phase 3 or deferred features present.
evidence: scripts/verify-phase2-deferred2.ps1 passes all checks (npm test 93/93 pass, npm run build clean).
src/shared/reminderStore.ts provides a deterministic createReminderStore with seed-based deterministic IDs and no side effects.

src/shared/reminderStore.test.ts covers adding reminders, independent ID sequences per store, pending listing, due detection sorted by dueAtMs, markComplete for found and unknown IDs, serialize/deserialize round-trip, corrupted data handling, empty text rejection, and non-finite dueAtMs rejection.
src/App.tsx integrates reminders minimally: a polling useEffect showing due reminders as speech bubbles with auto-complete, plus a toggleable inline reminder input form.
loop/reports/phase-2-deferred2-acceptance.md exists with complete scope and forbidden-feature documentation.
Forbidden files confirmed absent: imagePixelator.ts, customCharacterManager.ts, startupLaunch.ts, hotkeys.ts, pluginActions.ts, backend.ts, notifications.ts.
manual_verification_required: User can add a lightweight local reminder via the inline form.
Due reminder appears as pet speech bubble.
Reminder is marked complete after being shown.
No OS/system notification or backend behavior is present.
next_maker_instruction: Phase 2 Deferred Slice 2 is complete. No further maker iteration needed for this slice. Awaiting human testing of the four manual verification items above before proceeding to subsequent phases.
